author: Dantaipan
title: Can’t handle big collections
content: App can’t handle big network collections. It chokes when adding a network drive with many files. If it succeeds to add it folders with many files don’t get added properly. For example I’ve got a lot of content from Beatles and Dylan and it won’t add these properly. One song on an album will get added and the name of the album will appear as that songs name. If you have a handful of digital files on your local machine it might be a good app but if you are looking for something to handle a big collection look elsewhere. Flacbox suffers from the same problem. Somehow MusicBee on the PC or Foobar for that matter handle large collections without issue.

Da mir die App Grundsätzlich gefällt wollte ich die nun auch auf dem Mac voll nutzen. Leider muss ich für die Pro Feature erneut bezahlen. Ok 34,99 Lifetime bin ich bereit zu investieren. Jedoch geht auch dies nicht da die App sobald man das PW zum Kauf eingegeben hat Abstürzt. Hoffe das die Fehler schnell identifiziert und behoben werden. Gerne Überdenke ich dann meine 3/5 Sterne Bewertung.

content:

Plus de 15 jours que j’essaie d’obtenir une réponse du développeur, en le contactant depuis son site, par mail et sur Reddit, et… rien, aucune réponse…

title: Mac版もありますが、今後に期待です。
content: iOS版を購入したましたが、Macでも使うことができました。若干翻訳が変ではありますが、日本語対応もしています。UIも簡素になっており、機能面では十分高機能ですが。ループ音楽のつなぎ目が切れてしまう点や、ウインドウを閉じてもドックに残ってしまう仕様は残念に思いました。今後に期待したいと思います。

author: KSPAHR
title: I Don’t Get It…
content: This app doesn’t sync playlists between the Mac and iPhone! What good is it? You expect me to manually update my playlists if I make a change in one place? The backup and restore method is incredibly clumsy and time consuming, so I’m not doing that each time. Plus when I did the backup and restore the number of albums, album artists, artists, and composers were different, how does that happen? When looking at the song list, why is the search button at the top of the song list which means I have to scroll to the top of the list each time I want to search for something. There is lots of basic user interface issues in this app that are not thought out.

author: Newmediaranger
title: L'app multi-connexions
content:
Quand on stocke dans le cloud de la musique en differents formats (mp3, flac,...), on se demande comment écouter (comprendre accéder) aux albums, playlists et mix. 

Evermusic est une bonne réponse avec un nombre d'options conséquent pour accéder à sa musique quelle que soit sa localisation. 

A tester et acheter.

author: Robert Stollar
title: Well worth the money.
content:
Tried Apple Music and Spotify and found them lacking in what I needed – to be able to utilise my existing vast collection of music without having to pay a subscription. And yes, you can use your own music with both of the above providers, but there were too many glitches and I just want to listen to my own music.
It is suprisingly hard to find a music player that does what it needs to do – play music. Evermusic does that and much more. It is packed with features, cloud connectivity and syncing between devices. I found it well woth the money.

content: i'm sorry but this is genuinely the worst app i've ever downloaded. every time i try to listen to an audio on here there's always a problem. it either doesn't play at all or looks like it's playing but i can't hear anything. it usually will play for about 5 seconds before the audio cuts out. it also will play with the audio cutting in and out and in and out over and over again. everything takes forever to load. the layout is super confusing if you're not used to it. when i first downloaded this it took me literal weeks to figure out how to arrange my audios in the order i wanted them in. i don't know who made this app but they should never make another ever again.

author: PowerObject!
title: A few more features will make this app...
content:
So far, I've found this app to have maximum features but it could some more help -

*** SYNC between devices to avoid redundant efforts.
Integration with Siri,
Scrolling Lyrics during playback.
YouTube audio downloader.
​Split audio into vocals and instruments using Spleeter​ opensource library.
MP3 editor.
Ringtone maker.
Play by folder.
While browsing GDrive, show only audio files.
Sort by file type

Themes not working?

Does a single purchase work on all our mac/iOS devices? Some discounts during Black Friday...

The built-in TicTacToe game is a nice-to-have but it is not good enough and too very easy to win. You may remove it to divert resources to making this app more robust.

Please install and see: Music Player with Equalizer -
apps . apple . com / ug/app/music-player-with-equalizer/id1604755155

The above app uses cool "realistic" knobs for -
Volume Boost
Bass
Treble
Pitch
Bass 3D effects

Also install/see BeatsBuddy for more cool features like​ -​
​Toggle automatic download (SYNC) to other devices.​
Metadata display in file list (cover, title, artist, album, duration, rating, number, genre, year, track listing, tags, added, last played, times played, size, color)​.
Multi-window support with independent audio player, output and volume per window.
Hand-off support.
Drag-n-drop.

The above features should make the app REPLETE. I'll gladly give it 5 Stars when the above are implemented.

author: Raga Multani
title: Fantastic App! For those who read the description
content: I also have been using the iOS version of this app for some time. The features in both versions are fantastic. The sound streaming, quality, uninterruped connection via WiFi to NAS or SMB are all flawless. I'm streaming from WD EX4 NAS to Audioengine WiFi speaker systems in multiple rooms. I eagerly pony up the money for the ongoing development, powerful options and features. This is not a simple local mp3 player. It would be better for potential users to read up on the features before buying the app. It isn't the developer's fault for buyers not reading the details BEFORE using the app. Excellent design and easy connections without having to configure NAS. 5 stars and more.

author: ramanet-ar
title: Sehr, sehr gute Musik App.
content: In Verbindung mit MS OneDrive habe ich wirklich sehr gute Verbindungs- und Wiedergabeergebnisse. Seit vielen, vielen Jahren die umfangreichste Musik App, die ich kenne. Es ist einfach traumhaft. Jetzt nutze ich endlich meine  OneDrive "Backups" auf meinen iOS und macOS Geräten kreuz und quer. Dazu Songs aus dem Apple iCloud Dienst oder von Magenta WebDav.Von lokalen Servern SMB oder WebDav. Was auch immer. Wirklich gut, stabil und völlig fehlerfrei. Tut mir fast leid, weil ich das Metier kenne und weiß, wie schwierig es ist, einen Fehler, der sich nicht selbst erklärt, zu fixen. Aber in meinem Fall ... alles gut. Etwas dumm finde ich, daß man bei der Wiederherstellung von lsbackup Dateien nicht mehrere "Teil-Sicherungen" zu einer gemeinsamen zusammenfügen kann. Man muß immer erst die gewünschte Bibliothek insgesamt scannen, was bei riesigem Mediathek Umfang recht lange dauert. 40.000 Songs in einem Rutsch ... das geht, aber das doppelte ... hab ich noch nicht probiert. Der Scan auf OneDrive würde bestimmt 48 Stunden dann dauern! Nun gut, man will nichts Unmögliches verlangen. Was nicht vorhanden ist, mir aber nicht fehlt, sind Songtexts. Und sehr gut ist der einmalige Kaufpreis. Bei einem Abo Angebot hätte ich die App gar nicht erst getestet.

content: Произвёл оплату в компьютаре но востальных устройствах не ограниченной версией не могу!!!

author: Nyan.Ntim
title: A full screen mode with just one image would be awesome
content: If there was a feature where the current song playing was the only image to show up for full screen mode, that would make this app complete, but so far i'm really enjoying the features it has to offer.

author: Monya21
title: Aktivieren  der Premium Version auf IMac klappt nicht!
content:
Ich habe bereits die Premium Version gekauft - muss  feststellen, dass die Schaltfläche "Einkäufe wiederherstellen" nicht funktioniert, um die gekaufte Premium Version desselben iTunes-Konto zu aktivieren. Bitte prüfen und aktivieren!

Vielen Dank !

author: electronicguy
title: it works
content: on my m1 macbook pro, it has what's expected from a player, smooth fade over from song to song, when playing the contents of a folder, yes just drag/drop a folder to play, excellent for party background

author: arpieb
title: Completely unintuitive, doesn't find most of my local music library
content:
First off, it was a challenge to figure out how to access my local files in my - um - stock macOS Music folder?  Then it just wanted to play them as a single playlist.  WHen I finally figured out how to "import" my already-imported albums (300 ) it then only reported I had 20 artists, which is off by an order of magnitude.

Lack of a useful help system and flaky functionality with a large local music library makes it more useless than Apple's Music app.  Removing.

author: pirenaico
title: no me ha servido de nada
content: Queria reproducir musica que tengo en carpetas dentro del ordenador... NADA. No la encuentra!

author: aaasderrtrt
title: Novedades
content: En un abrir y cerrar de ojos, el equipo de soporte me hizo caso y arregló el problema de conexión de Webdav. Un 5* para ellos y el programa. Ahora no me deja restaurar las compras, pero ya seguiré probando.

author: DevinPak
title: 맥에서 클라우드 플레이어가 필요하다면 추천합니다
content: 아이폰에서 사용중인데 추천합니다

author: РokМАСТЕР
title: Жадность или недоработка? Время покажет.
content: Установил данное приложение на свой Mac. Купил PRO версию. Далее решил установить приложение на iPhone. Установил. А PRO версия мне недоступна! Купите снова! Восстановить покупки не удаётся. Чтобы ползоваться приложением на MacBook и на iPhone разработчик предлагает купить его дважды по 899 рублей. Итого 1600 рубликов. Не круто ли получается то?

author: Much2think
title: Love it
content: Love it

author: Igor Les
title: super app
content: Super app. Have it on iphone
